error_message: Focused contracts test failed because renderScenario ignored executionPolicyOverrides and accepted tokenBudget: 0.
root_cause: RenderOptions/buildExecutionPolicy did not accept or merge approved execution-policy override fields, so schema validation only saw defaults.
fix: Added ExecutionPolicyOverrides support to renderScenario/buildExecutionPolicy and merged overrides on top of scenario-specific defaults so schema parsing still rejects invalid values.

error_message: Reviewer found that scenarios C/D still threw when only executionPolicyOverrides.perAttemptTimeoutMs was provided.
root_cause: buildExecutionPolicy resolved timeoutMs for scenarios C/D before checking executionPolicyOverrides.perAttemptTimeoutMs, so override-only calls still hit the operator-timeout guard.
fix: Changed buildExecutionPolicy to compute perAttemptTimeoutMs as override-first and added a regression test proving scenario C renders with only executionPolicyOverrides.perAttemptTimeoutMs.

error_message: Reviewer found that validation/v1/lib/scenarios.ts still spread executionPolicyOverrides directly into executionPolicy, allowing unapproved runtime fields to override maxAttempts, autonomyLevel, or worktreeRequired.
root_cause: buildExecutionPolicy merged the caller-supplied executionPolicyOverrides object wholesale, so JS callers or `as any` values could bypass the intended TypeScript-only Pick restriction at runtime.
fix: Added an explicit runtime whitelist helper for the four approved override fields and added a regression test proving unapproved fields are ignored when passed via `as any`.

error_message: Focused Task 2 test failed because ../../validation/v1/lib/a04.js did not exist yet.
root_cause: The A-04 mechanical preflight helper and CLI had not been implemented, so the new Vitest suite could not load the module under test.
fix: Added validation/v1/lib/a04.ts, validation/v1/scripts/prepare-a04.ts, and tests/validation/prepareA04.test.ts to implement the helper, CLI, and locked approval-package/preflight behavior.

error_message: Reviewer found Task 2 accepted arbitrary positive A-04 execution-policy values and claimed mainCheckoutMustRemainUnchanged without checking tracked repo-root cleanliness.
root_cause: prepareA04 passed through any positive override values from scenario rendering and advertised the main-checkout invariant without capturing tracked git status before and after deterministic preflight.
fix: Added a fixed A-04 execution-policy validator used by the helper, CLI, and approval-package builder; added repo-root tracked-cleanliness checks around deterministic preflight; expanded focused regression tests for contract/evidence refusal and cleanliness failures.
